briefings.title: Morning Briefing — Monday, March 17
briefings.content:
## Good morning, Brad & Ben. Here's your Monday rundown.

### 🔥 Hot Leads (3)
- **Mooseheads** follow-up overdue by 2 days — they asked about a reorder of ~200 pucks hoodies. Reach out today.
- **Jubilee Music Festival** responded to your DM — they want to chat custom festival merch before April 15 deadline.
- **NSCAD University** tender posted Friday — apparel supply contract, $8,000–$14,000 range. Full details in Tender Alerts.

### 📦 Pipeline This Week
- 4 active deals in pipeline (2 quoted, 1 contacted, 1 new)
- **Wildcats reorder** still waiting on PO — nudge Brad Rud by EOD

### 📱 Social
- No posts scheduled. Content queue is empty — time to drop something. Ben, what's in the library?
- Last Instagram post was 9 days ago. Engagement will drop if we go quiet.

### 📧 Email
- **2,200 subscribers** sitting idle. Last campaign was Feb 28. A spring drop announcement would hit well right now.
- Recommend: 1 campaign this week. Subject: *New season, new drops.* — want me to draft it?

### 💡 Ace's Pick of the Day
> Hockey season winds down in April — that's 4 weeks to push team reorders before the off-season. Hit every CHL contact you have *this week*.

---
*Ace — Apollo Originals Intelligence*
